prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含2021-2023理科）最低位次依次约15732→14810→14332→15443→19645，整体呈先升后降再大幅后移走势；2024年较2023年后移约1111名，20 25年较2024年大幅后移约4202名，近两年累计后移约5313名，2025年基准约19645名；本省物理类计划2021年92人、2022年87人、2023年95人、2024年103人、20 25年104人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划105人，较2025年仅增加1人，扩幅约0.96%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学排名2026年第88名（2025年第86名、2024年第102名），近年排名稳中有升，整体处于全国中上游水平；2025年高考周期内该校出现师德师风负面舆情（教 师被指性骚扰学生），评价为偏负面；抖音热度总排名第90位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中低水平；未见明显投档断档记录；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖 ），中药学相关学科实力突出；与招生专业中的药学类、中药学类、临床药学、生物制药等高度对应，对医药类考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学/临床药学/生物 制药等医药类专业社会热度持续偏热，临床医学、口腔医学等医学大类近年均为高热推荐；本省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，较2025年总考生约46.2万略有下降，物理类考生 估算约31.3万（较2025年32.1万减少约2.4%），竞争压力略有缓解；中国药科大学位于江苏南京，属长三角热门地域，对安徽考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在安徽招生规模较大（物理类100余人），属该校重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势惯性、2026年计划仅微扩0.96%、本省物理类考生略减约2.4%以及声誉偏负面等因素：扩招和考生减少对位次有双向对冲作用，但2025年位次已 处于近年高位，预计2026年竞争略有缓和，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约19558名，区间19058–20058名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science Category from 2021-2023) were approximately 15732 → 14810 → 14332 → 15443 → 19645, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, and then significantly dropping; in 2024, it dropped by about 1111 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it dropped significantly by about 4202 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative drop of about 5313 places in the last two years, and the 2025 baseline is about 19645 places; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 92 in 2021, 87 in 2022, 95 in 2023, 103 in 2024, and 104 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 105, an increase of only 1 compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 0.96%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 88th in 2026 (86th in 2025, 102nd in 2024), with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level nationally; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (a teacher was accused of sexually harassing students), rated as somewhat negative; its Douyin heat total ranking is 90th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top nationally), and Traditional Chinese Medicine-related disciplines are strong; it highly corresponds to the enrollment majors such as Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine, Clinical Pharmacy, and Biopharmaceuticals, maintaining a sustained appeal to medical and pharmaceutical candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for medical and pharmaceutical majors such as Pharmacy, Clinical Pharmacy, and Biopharmaceuticals continues to be relatively high, and medical categories like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have been highly recommended in recent years; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province for 2026 is about 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 313,000 (a decrease of about 2.4% from 321,000 in 2025), easing competitive pressure slightly; China Pharmaceutical University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a popular region in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Anhui candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Anhui (over 100 in Physics Category), making it one of the university's important source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the minimal expansion of 0.96% in 2026, the slight decrease of about 2.4% in provincial Physics Category candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation: expansion and candidate reduction have a two-way offset effect on rankings, but since the 2025 ranking is already at a high level in recent years, competition is expected to ease slightly in 2026, with a small forward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 19558, with a range of 19058–20058.

- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class)
- Traditional Chinese Medicine (Top Innovation Class)

- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (including Pharmaceutical Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health, Environmental Science)
- Biotechnology
- Marine Pharmacy

- Pharmaceutical Economics and Management
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 19558, range 19058–20058. Candidates within the range are advised to prioritize Tier 2 Pharmacy Category and Clinical Pharmacy as main choices, Tier 1 Top Innovation Classes can be attempted as a stretch (requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 Traditional Chinese Medicine Category and Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category as safety options. Pharmacy's A+ discipline strength is prominent, so it is recommended to prioritize core majors such as Pharmacy Category and Clinical Pharmacy.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 经济管理类社会热度分化观望，英语/外语类一般观望；本省2026年历史类考生估算约13.8万（较2025年14.14万减 少约2.4%），竞争压力略有缓解；南京属长三角热门城市，对安徽文科考生 有较强吸引力；但该校文科招生专业少（仅2个），选择空间有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including 2021-2023 Liberal Arts) were approximately 3138 → 3106 → 3240 → 3626 → 3680, showing a gradual backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 542 positions over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 3680. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 9 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 10 in 2025, with small fluctuations. The 2026 plan is 15, an increase of 5 from 2025, a 50% expansion, which is a significant enrollment increase and will notably reduce competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 88th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, with a stable upward trend in recent years. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics emerged (somewhat negative evaluation). Douyin popularity ranks 90th, with an 'average' evaluation and no obvious abnormal popularity signals. Pharmacy (A+) is the core advantage of the university, but the History Category enrollment majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, English) are not directly related to pharmacy, limiting the appeal of the discipline advantage to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Economics and Management is divided and cautious; English/Foreign Languages are generally cautious. The estimated number of History Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 138,000 (a decrease of about 2.4% from 141,400 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. Nanjing, as a popular city in the Yangtze River Delta, has strong appeal to Anhui liberal arts examinees. However, the university offers few liberal arts majors (only 2), limiting choice.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward trend of History Category rankings, the significant 50% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the slight decrease in examinees: the expansion is the most critical factor affecting 2026 rankings. A 50% expansion will significantly lower the admission threshold, and rankings are expected to shift notably backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5084, with a range of 4584–5584.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction) (including Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
None currently (History Category has only 2 enrollment majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 5084, with a range of 4584–5584. History Category has only 2 enrollment majors, with Economics and Management Experimental Class and English having similar rankings. Both majors can be applied for within the ranking range. The Economics and Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction), combined with the university's pharmaceutical industry characteristics, offers a broader employment scope and is recommended as a priority.
